title: There Must Be a Clear Voice to Counter the War Hawks: Discuss Helga Zepp-LaRouche
description:
We need everyone to muster their courage and intervene across the world! Have a discussion with Helga Zepp-LaRouche! Go through the world historic situation and what we can do to intervene on it. 

Email in your questions, thoughts and organizing reports to 
questions@schillerinstitute.org 
or join us live and post them in the YouTube chat.

We look forward to hearing from you!
Have fun.
